sections.label: Chorus
lines: Mailam ka pai ciang in nuam
Singlamteh in inn lam hong hilh.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Singlamteh phung ka van teng tolh khia khin hi,
Ka lung sung phat na tawh ki dim.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Si kithehna lam tawn ka ciah suak ding hi,
Pasian inn sung ka kha teng ding.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Singlamteh lampi Topa'n tawn masa in
kei a dingin hong si hi,
ma a dingin nuntakna thak ka muhna hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Leitung lampi mangpha ka khak ta ding hi,
Inn lam zuan in kei ciah ta ning.
